10627.unparsed_text:
Token Effects

Resource Forced - When an enemy would move via a keyword and 1 or more barriers are between its location and the location it is moving to: Remove one of those barriers. Cancel the effects of the move.
Horror Forced - When an enemy enters a location with a decoy: Remove the decoy. Deal 1 damage to that enemy, disengage it from each investigator, and exhaust it. That enemy cannot ready for the remainder of the round.
Damage Forced - When an enemy enters a location with a trap: Remove the trap. Deal 2 damage to that enemy.

53041.name: Chapultepec Park
53041.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you fail an [agility] test while at Chapultepec Park: .
[action]: Explore. Test [agility] (3). If you succeed, draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a location with a matching location symbol in the upper-left corner, place it on top of this location, taking its place

53042.name: Zócalo
53042.unparsed_text: [action] Discard cards with a combined total of at least 4 skill icons from your hand: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a location with a matching location symbol in the upper-left corner, place it on top of this location, taking its place.

53043.name: Xochimilco
53043.unparsed_text: [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade an enemy at Xochimilco: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a location with a matching location symbol in the upper-left corner, place it on top of this location, taking its place.

53044.name: Coyoacán
53044.unparsed_text:
While you are at Coyoacán, damage/horror cannot be healed from cards you control.
[action] If you have 5 or more total damage and/or horror on your investigator: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a location with a matching location symbol in the upper-left corner, place it on top of this location, taking its place.

53045.name: Return to Heart of the Elders, Part 1
53045.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Heart of the Elders, Part 1 shown here.
- Remove Act 1a - "Search for the Pattern" from the game and replace it with the new Act 1a - "A Familiar Pattern."
(Continued on reverse side.)

53046.name: A Familiar Pattern
53046.unparsed_text: Objective - When the investigators have collected the requisite number of clues, they must immediately spend them and advance.

53047.name: Feathered Serpent
53047.unparsed_text:
X is the number of pillar tokens on Mouth of K'n-yan. While X is 3 or higher, Feathered Serpent gains alert and hunter.
[action]: Evade. Check your supplies. If you have a mysterious scepter, you automatically evade the serpent and command it to deal its damage to another enemy at its location.

53048.name: Return to Heart of the Elders, Part 2
53048.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Heart of the Elders, Part 2 shown here.
- After setup, search the collection for the new Harbinger of Valusia (The Sleeper Returns) and set it aside, out of play. If the Harbinger of Valusia would enter play during this scenario, use this version instead of the original one.
(Continued on reverse side.)

53049.name: Ruins of K'n-yan
53049.unparsed_text: [action] [action]: Check your supplies. If you have a compass, discover 2 clues on Ruins of K'n-yan. (Group limit once per game.)

53050.name: Subterranean Swamp
53050.unparsed_text:
[fast] If there are no clues on Subterranean Swamp: Check your supplies. If you have a canteen, place 1 doom on this location and record "sticky goop" in your supplies. (Group limit once per game.)
Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Subterranean Swamp: Check your supplies. If you do not have a pocketknife, lose all remaining actions and end your turn.

53051.name: Chthonian Depths
53051.unparsed_text: Forced - After the last clue is discovered from Chthonian Depths: Check your supplies. If no investigator at this location has torches, place 1 doom on it.

53052.name: Treacherous Descent
53052.unparsed_text: [action]: Check your supplies. If you have a pickaxe, reduce the shroud value of Treacherous Descent by 2 for the remainder of the scenario. (Group limit 3 times per game.)

53053.name: Return to The City of Archives
53053.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The City of Archives shown here.
- Put Halls of Pnakotus (Southern Corridors) into play.
(Continued on reverse side.)

53054.name: Unrestricted Access
53054.unparsed_text:
Objective - If three of the following are true, you must advance:
- An investigator "found the process."
- An investigator "dissected an organ."
- An investigator "interviewed a subject."
- An investigator "realized what year it is."
- An investigator "activated the device."
- An investigator controls The Custodian.
- An investigator "read about Earth."
- An investigator "saw a familiar specimen."

53055.name: Halls of Pnakotus
53055.unparsed_text:
This location is connected to Halls of Pnakotus (Eastern Corridors) and Halls of Pnakotus (Western Corridors), and vice versa.
[fast] During your turn, choose and discard a card from your hand: Move to another copy of Halls of Pnakotus. (Limit once per turn.)

53056.name: Cyclopean Vaults
53056.unparsed_text:
[action]: Discard each non-weakness card in your hand.
[action] If you have no cards in your hand: Remember that you "read about Earth."
[action] [action] If you have fewer than 5 cards in your hand: Draw cards until you have exactly 5 cards in your hand.

53057.name: Alien Conservatory
53057.unparsed_text:
While you are in the Alien Conservatory, decrease your maximum hand size by 2.
[action]: Test [willpower] (1). If you succeed, test [agility] (2). If you succeed, test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, remember that you "saw a familiar specimen."

53058.name: Captive Subjects
53058.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Alien Conservatory.
Aloof. Retaliate.
If an investigator "read about Earth" or "saw a familiar specimen," Captive Subjects loses aloof and gains hunter.

53059.name: Return to The Depths of Yoth
53059.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Depths of Yoth shown here.
- After setup, search the collection for the new Harbinger of Valusia (The Sleeper Returns) and set it aside, out of play. If the Harbinger of Valusia would enter play during this scenario, use this version instead of the original one.
(Continued on reverse side.)

53060.name: Perils of Yoth
53060.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Set Perils of Yoth aside, out of play. (This exploration fails.)
- Set Perils of Yoth aside, out of play: take horror or damage equal to the current depth level; and continue exploring as if you had not drawn Perils of Yoth.

53061.name: Return to Shattered Aeons
53061.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Shattered Aeons shown here.
- When building the exploration deck, use only the 4 single-sided [[Otherworld]] locations. Do not include any of the other encounter cards listed in the original setup instructions.
(Continued on reverse side.)

53062.name: Great Hall of Celeano
53062.unparsed_text: [reaction] After you move to Great Hall of Celeano, place 1 doom on it: Look at the top card of the encounter deck, the exploration deck, or any player deck. You may discard that card.

53063.name: Buenos Aires
53063.unparsed_text:
Buenos Aires gets -2 shroud for each doom on it.
Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Place 1 doom on Buenos Aires.

53064.name: Ultima Thule
53064.unparsed_text: Forced - After Ultima Thule enters play: Search the chaos bag for the [elder_sign] chaos token and seal it on Ultima Thule.

53065.name: Unknowable Past
53065.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Reveal 4 chaos tokens. For each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol revealed,  and 1 horror.
- Choose and discard 1 card from your hand and shuffle Unknowable Past into the exploration deck. You cannot choose this option if Unknowable Past was drawn from the exploration deck

53066.name: Return to Turn Back Time
53066.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Forgotten Age Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Turn Back Time shown here.
- Gather the 3 Pit Viper cards from the Serpents encounter set and set them aside, out of play.
- Before setup, remove the original Burial Pit, Underground Ruins, and Secret Passage locations from the game.
(Continued on reverse side.)

53067.name: Riverside Temple
53067.unparsed_text: Forced - After any number of clues are discovered at Riverside Temple: Check your supplies. If no investigator at Riverside Temple has chalk, shuffle an equal number of cards from the top of the encounter deck into the exploration deck.

53068.name: Waterfall
53068.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you investigate Waterfall: Check your supplies. If an investigator at Waterfall has rope, reduce Waterfall's shroud by 3 for this investigation.
Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Waterfall: Discard 1 card at random from your hand.

53069.name: Trail of the Dead
53069.unparsed_text: Forced - After you investigate or explore while at Trail of the Dead: Check your supplies. If no investigator at Trail of the Dead has binoculars

53070.name: Cloud Forest
53070.unparsed_text: Forced - When an enemy at Cloud Forest would be dealt any amount of damage: Check your supplies. If no investigator at Cloud Forest has torches, cancel that damage.

53071.name: Brotherhood Acolyte
53071.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Location with the most [[Cultist]] enemies.
Aloof.
Forced - After Brotherhood Acolyte enters plaay: Place 1 doom on each other [[Cultist]] enemy at its location.

53072.name: Stolen Mind
53072.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Any empty location.
Retaliate.
Stolen Mind gets +1 fight for each doom on it.
Forced - At the end of the mythos phase: Place 1 doom on Stolen Mind.

53074.name: Resentful Wilds
53074.unparsed_text: Forced - After you successfully explore at attached location: Add Resentful Wilds to the victory display.

53075.name: Best-Laid Plans
53075.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Lose 2 actions.
- Shuffle the top card of the encounter deck into the exploration deck.

53077.name: Tindalos Alpha
53077.unparsed_text:
Alert. Retaliate.
Forced - After Tindalos Alpha attacks you: Shuffle a non-story asset you control into your deck, moving all damage and horror from that asset to your investigator. Discard Tindalos Alpha.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Discard Tindalos Alpha.

53078.name: Vengeful Serpent
53078.unparsed_text:
Hunter.
Forced - After you draw Vengeful Serpent: Draw each Vengeful Serpent in the victory display as well.

53079.name: Serpent Guardian
53079.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Nearest location with at least 1 clue.
Aloof.
While Serpent Guardian is unengaged, its location gets +2 shroud.
While there are 3 or more vengeance points in the victory display, Serpent Guardian loses aloof and gains hunter.

54001.name: The Star • XVII
54001.unparsed_text:
Each asset you control with health gets +1 health.
Each asset you control with sanity gets +1 sanity.
[reaction] When the game begins, if The Star • XVII is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54002.name: Hallowed Mirror
54002.unparsed_text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[reaction] When you play a copy of Soothing Melody: Either change each "2" on it to a "3," or shuffle it into your deck instead of discarding it.
Forced - After Hallowed Mirror enters play: Search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Soothing Melody. Add 1 to your hand and shuffle the other 2 into your deck.

54003.name: The World • XXI
54003.unparsed_text:
[fast] If you have 8 or more cards in your hand, exhaust The World • XXI: .
[reaction] When the game begins, if The World • XXI is in your opening hand: Put it into play

54004.name: Occult Lexicon
54004.unparsed_text:
Limit 1 per deck.
[reaction] When you play a copy of Blood-Rite: Either change each "2" on it to a "3," or shuffle it into your deck instead of discarding it.
Forced - After Occult Lexicon enters play: Search your bonded cards for 3 copies of Blood-Rite. Add 1 to your hand and shuffle the other 2 into your deck.

54005.name: Knight of Swords
54005.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you would succeed at a skill test: You get +1 skill value for this test. You may discard Knight of Swords to get +3 instead.
[reaction] When the game begins, if Knight of Swords is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54006.name: Well Connected
54006.unparsed_text:
Limit 1 per investigator.
[fast] Exhaust Well Connected: You get +1 skill value for this skill test for every 4 resources you have.
[fast] Spend 2 resources: Ready Well Connected. (Limit once per round.)

54007.name: The Hierophant • V
54007.unparsed_text:
You have 1 additional arcane slot.
Your arcane slots can be used to hold cards that take up accessory slots, and vice versa.
[reaction] When the game begins, if The Hierophant • V is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54008.name: Sign Magick
54008.unparsed_text:
You have 1 additional arcane slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] asset.
[reaction] After you activate an [action] ability on a [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] asset, exhaust Sign Magick: Activate an [action] ability on a different [[Spell]] or [[Ritual]] asset you control (without paying its [action] cost).

54009.name: Nine of Rods
54009.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you draw a non-weakness encounter card, exhaust Nine of Rods: Cancel all of that card's effects and shuffle it into the encounter deck. Then, draw another card from the top of the encounter deck.
[reaction] When the game begins, if Nine of Rods is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54010.name: Trial by Fire
54010.unparsed_text: Until the end of your turn, set the base value of each of your skills to 5, or the base value of one of your skills to 7.

54011.name: The Fool • 0
54011.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you play a card, exhaust The Fool • 0: Reduce that card's cost by 1.
[reaction] When the game begins, if The Fool • 0 is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54012.name: Moon Pendant
54012.unparsed_text:
You have 1 additional tarot slot.
Each non-weakness [[Tarot]] asset in your hand or committed to a skill test gains [wild] [wild].
[reaction] When the game begins, if Moon Pendant is in your opening hand: Put it into play.

54013.name: Observed
54013.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per investigator.
Before setting up each game, draw 3 random cards from the tarot deck and choose 1. Place the chosen card in front of you, in the upright position. Each other investigator ignores its effects. Shuffle the rest back into the tarot deck.

54014.name: Damned
54014.unparsed_text:
Permanent.
Before setting up each game, draw a random card from the tarot deck and place the chosen card in front of you, in the reverse position. Each other investigator ignores its effects.

54015.name: The Devil • XV
54015.unparsed_text:
You cannot play assets other than The Devil • XV while it is in your hand.
If The Devil • XV is drawn in your opening hand during setup (before or after taking a mulligan), you cannot replace it. It must stay in your opening hand.

54016.name: Return to Disappearance at the Twilight Estate
54016.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Disappearance at the Twilight Estate shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54017.name: Return to The Witching Hour
54017.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Witching Hour shown here.
- Remove Arkham Woods (Quiet Glade) from the game.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54018.name: A Circle Unbroken
54018.unparsed_text: Objective - "Perhaps we can learn more from them..." If there are more than 1 [per_investigator] exhausted [[Witch]] enemies at the Witches' Circle, investigators at the Witches' Circle may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

54019.name: Witch-Haunted Woods
54019.unparsed_text: [fast]  and 1 direct horror: Choose an investigator at a different Witch-Haunted Woods. That investigator heals 1 damage and 1 horror. (Group limit once per round.)

54020.name: Witch-Haunted Woods
54020.unparsed_text: Forced - When you discover the last clue from this location: Draw the topmost [[Hex]] treachery in the encounter discard pile. (If you cannot, instead discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Hex]] treachery is discarded, and draw it.)

54021.name: Arkham Woods
54021.unparsed_text: During the "enemy attacks" step of the enemy phase, instead of their standard attack, each ready [[Witch]] enemy at this location attacks each investigator in play. Attacks made in this way do not cause the enemy to exhaust.

54022.name: Arkham Woods
54022.unparsed_text: While you are at this location, you cannot cancel or ignore card or game effects, and each encounter card you draw gains peril.

54023.name: Arkham Woods
54023.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you successfully investigate this location: Discard 1 card from the top of the encounter deck for each point you succeeded by.
Forced - When the encounter deck runs out of cards: Each investigator at this location takes 2 damage.

54024.name: Return to At Death's Doorstep
54024.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to At Death's Doorstep shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54025.name: Senator Nathaniel Rhodes
54025.unparsed_text:
Aloof.
[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (2) to speak with the Senator. If you succeed, either take control of 1 of his clues, or flip 1 doom on him to its clue side. If you fail, flip one of his clues to its doom side.

54026.name: Dmitri Konstantinov
54026.unparsed_text:
Spawn - The location with no other [[Silver Twilight]] enemies farthest from you.
Forced - After Dmitri Konstantinov enters play: Place 2 doom on him.
[reaction] After you evade Dmitri Konstantinov: For every 2 points you succeeded by, remove 1 doom from him.

54027.name: Wine Cellar
54027.unparsed_text:
Victorian Halls is connected to Wine Cellar.
[action]: You disturb the tranquility of this quiet place in search of evidence. Discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until a [[Monster]] enemy is discarded. Set that enemy aside, out of play. Then gain 2 clues (from the token pool). (Group limit once per game.)

54028.name: Wine Cellar
54028.unparsed_text:
Victorian Halls is connected to Wine Cellar.
[reaction] After you successfully investigate the Wine Cellar: Either discover 1 additional clue, or remove 1 doom from a [[Silver Twilight]] enemy in play.
Haunted - You must either place 1 doom on a [[Silver Twilight]] enemy in play, or

54029.name: Return to The Secret Name
54029.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Secret Name shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54030.name: Temple of R'lyeh
54030.unparsed_text: Forced - After you reveal Temple of R'lyeh: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail,  If you fail by 3 or more, that card gains surge

54031.name: The Price Manor
54031.unparsed_text:
[action]: Test [combat] (5) to topple the strange, eldritch statue. If you succeed, remove 1 doom from Nahab, even if she is out of play. (Group limit one success per game.)
Haunted - Place 1 doom on Nahab (even if she is out of play).

54032.name: The 9th Ward
54032.unparsed_text:
[action]: Investigate. Investigate using [agility] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, after discovering clues, you may move to any [[Extradimensional]] location.
Haunted - You cannot leave The 9th Ward this round. During your turn, reduce the shroud value of The 9th Ward by 1.

54033.name: Library of Ebla
54033.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [willpower] (5) to search the library for arcane lore. If you succeed, deal 3 damage to Nahab, even if she is out of play. (Group limit one success per game.)

54034.name: Return to The Wages of Sin
54034.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Wages of Sin shown here.
- Set the Erynn MacAoidh story asset aside, out of play.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54035.name: In Pursuit of Answers
54035.unparsed_text: Locations cannot be flipped to their [[Spectral]] side.

54036.name: In Pursuit of the Beyond
54036.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you would "banish" a ghost: You may instead place it beneath Erynn MacAoidh, Heretic side faceup.
[action] If you are at Erynn MacAoidh's location, spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Parley. Choose a Heretic beneath her and place it beneath this act.
Objective - Help Erynn find answers by placing Heretics beneath this act. If there are 3 beneath this act, advance.

54037.name: Hangman's Brook
54037.unparsed_text: [action]: Resign. "Whose bright idea was this, anyway?"

54038.name: Heretic
54038.unparsed_text:
Heretic gets +2 [per_investigator] health.
While Heretic is at a non-[[Spectral]] location, it gains aloof and cannot be engaged or damaged.
[fast] Spend 1 clue: Parley. Look at Heretic's other side (without resolving its text).
Forced - After Heretic is defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

54039.name: Heretic
54039.unparsed_text:
Heretic gets +2 [per_investigator] health.
While Heretic is at a non-[[Spectral]] location, it gains aloof and cannot be engaged or damaged.
[fast] Spend 1 clue: Parley. Look at Heretic's other side (without resolving its text).
Forced - After Heretic is defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

54040.name: Witchweed
54040.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- ...from the standard encounter deck, shuffle it into the spectral encounter deck.
- ...from the spectral encounter deck, trigger each haunted ability on your location twice. You may give Witchweed surge to place it in the standard encounter discard pile. Otherwise, place it in the spectral encounter discard pile.

54041.name: Erynn MacAoidh
54041.unparsed_text:
Uses (3 secrets).
.
[reaction] When you draw a non-weakness [[Curse]] or [[Power]] treachery, spend 1 secret and exhaust Erynn MacAoidh: Cancel that card's revelation effect.

54042.name: Return to For the Greater Good
54042.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to For the Greater Good shown here.
- Set the new Hidden Passageway and Sanctum Doorway locations aside, out of play.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54043.name: Lounge
54043.unparsed_text:
Forced - After the Lounge is revealed: Put the set-aside Vault and Library locations into play.
[action] Investigators at the Lounge spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Put the set-aside Hidden Passageway location into play.

54044.name: Relic Storage
54044.unparsed_text:
While an investigator controls the [skull] key, Relic Storage is connected to Lodge Catacombs, and vice versa.
Forced - After Relic Storage is revealed: Place 1 random set-aside key on it.

54045.name: Shrouded Archive
54045.unparsed_text: [action]: Choose a ([skull]/[cultist]/[tablet]/[elder_thing]) key on a card and test [willpower] or [intellect] (8). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each [[Silver Twilight]] enemy in play. If you succeed, swap the chosen key with another key in play or with a set-aside ([skull]/[cultist]/[tablet]/[elder_thing]) key.

54046.name: Return to Union and Disillusion
54046.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Union and Disillusion shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54047.name: Beyond the Mist (v. V)
54047.unparsed_text:
[fast] During a circle action, spend 1 clue: Reduce the difficulty of this skill test by 2.
Objective - If each Unvisited Isle location in play is revealed and the brazier on each of them is lit, advance.

54048.name: Brazier Enchantment
54048.unparsed_text:
Increase the difficulty of each skill test during circle actions on locations by 2.
[action]: Circle. Test your lowest skill + your next lowest skill (6). If you succeed, discard Brazier Enchantment. If you fail, resolve each haunted ability on your location.

54049.name: Return to In the Clutches of Chaos
54049.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to In the Clutches of Chaos shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54050.name: French Hill
54050.unparsed_text: [action]: Move any number of breaches from French Hill to the current act. Then, test [willpower] (X), where X is the number of breaches moved. For each point you fail by

54051.name: Rivertown
54051.unparsed_text: [action]: Move any number of breaches from Rivertown to the current act. Then, test [intellect] (X), where X is 1 more than the number of breaches moved. For each point you fail by, either  or 1 damage

54052.name: Southside
54052.unparsed_text: [action]: Evade. Use this ability on any enemy in play or in the encounter discard pile. If you fail, that enemy attacks you (even if it is not in play). If you succeed, instead of evading the chosen enemy, move all breaches from Southside to the current act.

54053.name: Uptown
54053.unparsed_text: [action]: Move any number of breaches from Uptown to the current act. Then, test [agility] (X), where X is the number of breaches moved. For each point you fail by

54054.name: South Church
54054.unparsed_text:
[action] [action]: Move all breaches from South Church to the current act.
[action]: Resign. You hide through the night.

54055.name: Merchant District
54055.unparsed_text: [action]: Move 1 breach from Merchant District to the current act. You may spend any number of charges, secrets, supplies, or ammo from any assets you control to move that many additional breaches.

54056.name: Return to Before the Black Throne
54056.unparsed_text:
Perform the setup as indicated in The Circle Undone Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:
- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Before the Black Throne shown here.
(Continued on reverse side.)

54057.name: What Must Be Done (v. II)
54057.unparsed_text:
[action] Spend X clues: Draw the top X cards of the Cosmos. Choose one to put into play using its "Cosmos -" instructions, and move to it. Shuffle the rest back into the Cosmos.
Objective - If the lead investigator is a The Black Throne and there are no clues on it, advance.

54058.name: Nightmare Breach
54058.unparsed_text: Cosmos - Connect in a direction of your choice, but only onto a spot where an empty space exists. Remove that empty space from the game instead of shuffling it back into its owner's deck. Then, discard each other copy of that card from play and from each investigator's hand.

54059.name: Interstellar Abyss
54059.unparsed_text:
Cosmos - Connect in the direction nearest to The Black Throne (or any direction if The Black Throne is not in play).
While you are at Interstellar Abyss, you cannot spend clues.

54060.name: Winding Gulf
54060.unparsed_text:
Cosmos - Connect to the leftmost revealed location in a direction of your choice. You may choose not to move to Winding Gulf and instead place 1 doom on Azathoth.
Haunted -  and 1 horror

54061.name: Nightgaunt Steed
54061.unparsed_text:

Permanent.

Permanent.

Standard
[skull]: -1. Reveal another token.

[elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, discard a random card from your hand.

Announce the chosen card's title to all three groups. Each other lead investigator draws that story card.

Each [[Distortion]] location gains:
"[action] [survivor]4+1< T %2[cultist]+: <+@2 H <@6@~+ [willpower]9 EIXODOLON. (Group limit once per game.)"
Objective - If each investigator is defeated, advance this agenda.

70007.unparsed_text: Timed - Do not advance this act until you are instructed. By the time the agenda advances, investigators must possess the Key of Mysteries and the requisite number of clues. (Beware - If the agenda advances and you do not meet this condition, the investigator in the Chamber of Rain will be killed.)

70009.name: The Levers (Group C)
70009.unparsed_text: Timed - Do not advance this act until you are instructed. Before the agenda advances, one investigator must activate the [action] ability on the Chamber of Regret. (Beware - If you pull the wrong lever, you will be killed.)

70010.name: The Levers (Group C)

70011.unparsed_text: Timed - Do not advance this act until you are instructed. When the agenda advances, there must be at least 11 doom in play. (Beware - If the agenda advances and you do not meet this condition, each investigator in this group will be killed.)

70012.name: Seeping Death (Group B)
70012.unparsed_text: Timed - Do not advance this act until you are instructed. Before the agenda advances, one investigator must activate the [action] ability on the Chamber of Poison.

70014.unparsed_text: Objective - At the end of the round, if Eixodolon has no remaining health, you may move any damage on him in excess of his health to another group's copy of Eixodolon. Then, advance.

70015.name: The Escape
70015.unparsed_text: Objective - If Eixodolon has no remaining health, advance.

70016.name: Chamber of Secrets

"Investigators cannot move into or out of this location.
Forced - When an investigator here draws an enemy card: Discard it and draw a new card to replace it."

70020.name: Chamber of Sorrows
70020.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [combat] (1) to try to break down the door to the flooding terrarium. Regardless of whether you succeed or fail, it does not budge. Remember that you "tried your best."

70021.name: Chamber of Sorrows

If you succeed, take control of 1 clue on an investigator in either Chamber of Sorrows or Chamber of Rain (or from that location if you are the only investigator in the game). Any investigator in either Chamber of Sorrows or Chamber of Rain may perform this action.

70022.name: Chamber of Night
70022.unparsed_text: [action]: You call out for help as loud as you can. Nobody responds.

70023.name: Chamber of Night
70023.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [intellect] (4). If you succeed, you notice strange writing inscribed along the wall; look at the revealed side of the location underneath the scenario reference card. When you are satisfied, place it back underneath the scenario reference card.

70024.name: Chamber of Regret

No more than one investigator may be in the Chamber of Regret at a time.
[action] The investigators spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: You pull one of the 3 levers (choose one): left, middle, or right. As soon as you do, the gate slams shut behind you. You cannot leave the Chamber of Regret for the remainder of the current act.

70025.unparsed_text: [fast] Choose and discard 2 cards from your hand: You find an old lockbox in a pile of refuse, and decide to leave something behind. At the end of the round, choose another investigator in any group. That investigator draws 2 cards. (Group limit once per game.)

70026.name: Labyrinthine Halls
70026.unparsed_text: [fast] Spend 4 resources: You find the corpse of someone you think you once knew, and wish you could have saved them. At the end of the round, choose another investigator in any group. That investigator gains 4 resources. (Group limit once per game.)

70027.name: Labyrinthine Halls
70027.unparsed_text: [action] [action]: You peer through an overgrown mirror and see an unfamiliar reflection. At the end of the round, choose another investigator in any group. That investigator may take 2 additional actions during his or her next turn. (Group limit once per game.)

70028.name: Chamber of Hunger
70028.unparsed_text: [fast] If there are no clues on Chamber of Hunger: There is something strange drawn on the glass. Take control of the set-aside Hunger Diagram.

70029.name: Chamber of Decay

70030.name: Chamber of Rot

In your chamber, you see a set of arcane runes etched upon the wall. If you can decode them and set them in the correct order, perhaps it will change something...

[fast] If there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on this card: Flip it over and follow the instructions on its other side.

70034.name: The Rift
70034.unparsed_text:
With a sudden flash of light, a rift begins to open in the wall nearby, energy slowly coalescing into the shape of a portal. It is too small to enter now, but soon it will be large enough for a person to step through...

Forced - At the end of the round, if there is at least 3 doom on each group's agenda: The rift opens wide enough for an investigator to step through. Choose an investigator at any location to enter the rift. Then, that investigator flips this card over and follows the instructions on its other side.

70035.unparsed_text:
You find a ventilation shaft through which you can fit some important items...

[fast]: Place any number of your resource tokens or clues on this card, and/or place any number of [[Item]] assets you control underneath this card. You may also place a written note underneath this card.
[action]: Take control of any number of tokens, cards, or notes on/underneath this card.
[reaction] At the end of the round: You send all of the tokens and cards gathered here through the ventilation shaft. Flip this card over and follow the instructions on the other side.

70036.name: The Dilemma
70036.unparsed_text:
Glowing words appear on your group's note as though written by an unseen entity. It reads: "Worry not. I shall give your friends a chance to escape. All you have to do is perish at their expense, and they will be given the means to escape. Just write 'I choose death' on this note here, and the deed will be done."

The current act gains: "[reaction] At the end of the round: Desperate, you are willing to sacrifice yourself for the benefit of the other groups. Flip The Dilemma over and follow the instructions on the other side."

70037.name: The Gate
70037.unparsed_text:
You notice a doorway in your chamber that wasn't there before. On the other side, the hall is pitch black. Where does it lead?

[action] Spend 1 clue: You enter the doorway. Flip this story card over and follow the instructions on its other side.

In your chamber, you see three lines of strange glyphs etched upon the wall. One line seems brighter than the others.

Forced - If there is at least 1 horror and 1 [per_investigator] damage on this card: Flip it over and follow the instructions on its other side.
[action]: Test [intellect] (2) to attempt to decipher the glyphs. If you succeed, place 1 damage on this card.
[action]: Test [willpower] (4) to move the glyphs to their proper order. If you succeed, place 1 horror on each group's copy of Encrypted Glyphs.

70039.unparsed_text: Forced - When you are defeated: Give control of Eixolodon's Note to another investigator.

Forced - When you are defeated: Place Key of Mysteries at your location.

Forced - When you are defeated: Give control of Mysterious Syringe to another investigator.

Forced - When you are defeated: Give control of Decay Diagram to another investigator.

Forced - When you are defeated: Give control of Decay Diagram to another investigator.
While you are in the Chamber of Decay, it gains: "[action]: Place 1 doom here. Flip any number of your clues to their doom side and place them here."

Hunter. Retaliate.
Eixodolon gets +6 [per_investigator] health and cannot be defeated by damage.
Forced - When the enemy phase begins, if there is a copy of Harvested Pain in the victory display: Ready Eixodolon.

70049.name: Eixodolon's Pet
70049.unparsed_text:
Hunter. Retaliate.
While Eixodolon's Pet is "locked away," it is immune to player card effects and Chamber of Hunger gains: "[action] Investigators at Chamber of Hunger spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Set Eixodolon's Pet aside, out of play. Remember that you "sent Eixodolon's Pet to another group."

70050.name: Eixodolon's Pet
70050.unparsed_text:
Hunter. Retaliate.
While Eixodolon's Pet is "locked away," it is immune to player card effects.

Spawn - Nearest Labyrinthine Halls.
Hunter.
Eixodolon's Note gains: "[action] Fight. Use only on The Jailor. Use either [willpower] or [combat] for this attack. If you succeed, set The Jailor aside, out of play. At the end of the round, move The Jailor to another group's Labyrinthine Halls (it keeps all tokens and attachments)."

70052.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Nearest [[Prison]] location.
Hunter.
Forced - After Faceless Abductor attacks an investigator: Move that investigator to a [[Prison]] location.

70054.unparsed_text:
Prey - Most remaining health.
For each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] token revealed during an attack against Mi-Go Guard, that attack deals 1 fewer damage.

70055.name: Unnatural Weariness
70055.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Lose 3 resources.
- Lose 1 action.
- Discard a random card from your hand.

70057.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you perform an action other than the [action] ability below: , discard an asset taking up at least 1 hand slot, and discard Dreadful Mechanism.
[action]: Test [combat] (2). If you succeed, discard Dreadful Mechanism

70059.unparsed_text: Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Paradox Effect and choose an investigator in another group. You and that investigator may talk in private and may exchange resources, story assets, and cards in hand.

70061.name: Harvested Pain
70061.unparsed_text:
Peril.

While Harvested Pain is in the victory display, Eixodolon gets +1 fight.

71001.unparsed_text:
Easy / Standard
[skull]: -X. X is the current agenda number.
[cultist]: -X. X is the number of [[Guest]] assets at your location (to a maximum of 5).
[tablet]: -2. (-4 instead if you are at a [[Private]] location).
[elder_thing]: -3. If you fail or if The Bloodless Man is at your location

71002.name: Masked Revelers
71002.unparsed_text:
Each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be dealt damage.
Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects.
Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it).

71003.name: Unexpected Guests
71003.unparsed_text:
Parley abilities on each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be triggered.
Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects.
Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it).

71004.name: A Killer Party
71004.unparsed_text:
Parley abilities on each [[Lantern Club]] enemy cannot be triggered.
Doom cannot be removed from this agenda by card effects.
Forced - When a single-sided [[Guest]] asset would leave play: It becomes spellbound instead (flip it facedown, lose control of it, and heal all damage and horror from it).

71005.unparsed_text:
[[Guest]] assets do not take up ally slots.
[action] Choose a [[Guest]] asset and a skill icon on it at your location: Parley. Test that skill (3). If you succeed, take control of that asset.
[action] If you control a [[Guest]] asset: Give control of it to another investigator at your location.
Objective - If each undefeated investigator controls a [[Guest]] asset and the current agenda is 2a or 3a, they may spend the requisite amount of clues, as a group, to advance.

71006.name: Finding the Jewel
71006.unparsed_text:
[[Guest]] assets do not take up ally slots.
[action] Choose a [[Guest]] asset and a skill icon on it at your location: Parley. Test that skill (3). If you succeed, take control of that asset.
Objective - Complete the objective on your faction story card, and try to accomplish as many tasks as you can (see page 24 of the rulebook).

71007.name: Lobby
71007.unparsed_text: [fast] If the current agenda is 2a or 3a, spend 1 [per_investigator] resources: Someone is fashionably late. Reveal the top card of the Guest deck and put it into play at this location. (Group limit once per round.)

71008.name: Lantern Chamber
71008.unparsed_text:
[fast] During your turn, name a card:  If it is the named card, cancel its effects and discard it. Discover 1 clue at this location. (Limit once per turn.)
[action] If this location has no clues: Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, flip over any spellbound card

71009.name: Art Gallery
71009.unparsed_text: [action]: There's more to be discovered in this room full of strange works of art. Place up to 2 clues (from the token pool) on this location. . (Group limit once per round.)

71010.name: Ballroom
71010.unparsed_text: [action]: Parley. You persuade two of the guests to have a dance. Exhaust 2 [[Guest]] assets at this location. Then,  from each of them

71011.unparsed_text: [fast] Spend 1 resource: Buy a drink!  or 1 horror from an investigator or [[Guest]] asset at this location. (Group limit once per round.)

71012.name: Bedroom
71012.unparsed_text: [action] Choose an enemy at any [[Second Floor]] location: Fight. You may use [agility] instead of [combat] for this attack. If you succeed, you may spend 1 clue for this attack to deal +2 damage. (Limit once per turn.)

71013.name: Library
71013.unparsed_text:
You get +1 skill value while parleying at this location.
[fast] If the Jewel of Sarnath is at this location: Test [intellect] (3). If you succeed, either place 1 damage on the Jewel of Sarnath or remove 1 token from it. (Group limit once per game.)

71014.name: Parlor
71014.unparsed_text:
This location gets -1 shroud for each [[Guest]] asset at it (to a minimum of 1 shroud).
[fast] If you control the Jewel of Sarnath: Exhaust an enemy at any location. (Group limit once per game.)

71015.name: The Foundation [guardian]
71015.unparsed_text:

[action] Investigators at Counting Room spend 10 [per_investigator] resources, as a group (5 [per_investigator] instead if you "found a vent"): Remember that you "obtained a schematic."
[reaction] After you successfully investigate Counting Room by 2 or more: . (Limit once per turn.)

88021.name: Vault Door
88021.unparsed_text:
[action] Move. Discard the top card of the encounter deck and check its game icon (if an investigator "obtained a schematic," you may mulligan up to two times):
- Ifits suit is ♣ or ♠: Move to Guard Room.
- If its suit is ♥: Move to Casino Lounge.
- If its suit is ♦: Move to Baccarat Table.

88022.name: Relic Room
88022.unparsed_text:
Forced - After Relic Room is revealed: Move all clues from The Wellspring of Fortune to Relic Room.
[action] If there are no clues on Relic Room: Take control of The Wellspring of Fortune and attach it to your investigator card.

88023.name: The Stakeout
88023.unparsed_text:
Each of the following is a task that can be completed in Fortune and Folly, Part I:
 □ An investigator "found a vent."
 □ An investigator "impersonated a high roller."
 □ An investigator "convinced Isamara to participate in the heist."
 □ An investigator "obtained an employee uniform."
 □ An investigator "stole Abarran's keys."
 □ An investigator "cleaned out the house."Forced - When an investigator is eliminated (by defeat or resignation): Place each of that investigator's clues on this story card, instead of placing them at their location.

88024.name: If the Uniform Fits…
88024.unparsed_text:
This casino employee looks like they are
wearing a uniform in your size.
[action]: Fight. Perform this attack only on the attached enemy. Test [combat] (3). If you succeed, attached enemy has been knocked out (read the section below). If you fail, raise your alarm level by 1.
If attached enemy leaves play, remove this story card from the game.If attached enemy is knocked out:
Remember that you "obtained an employee uniform."
Raise your alarm level by 1 if another enemy is at your location or a connecting location.
Discard the attached enemy. Remove this story card from the game.

88025.name: Fortune's Disfavor
88025.unparsed_text:
Isamara warned you that the relic you seek possesses strange abilities that bring misfortune upon those who are not favored by its bearer. Perhaps, then, you should have factored a sudden turn of fortune into your plans. For, at this moment, in the midst of your high-stakes heist, everything is about to be turned upside-down...
Flip this card over and resolve the text on its other side.

88026.name: Fortune's Disfavor
88026.unparsed_text:
Isamara warned you that the relic you seek possesses strange abilities that bring misfortune upon those who are not favored by its bearer. Perhaps, then, you should have factored a sudden turn of fortune into your plans. For, at this moment, in the midst of your high-stakes heist, everything is about to be turned upside-down...
Flip this card over and resolve the text on its other side.

88027.unparsed_text:
Isamara warned you that the relic you seek possesses strange abilities that bring misfortune upon those who are not favored by its bearer. Perhaps, then, you should have factored a sudden turn of fortune into your plans. For, at this moment, in the midst of your high-stakes heist, everything is about to be turned upside-down...
Flip this card over and resolve the text on its other side.

88028.name: The Face
88028.unparsed_text:
Cannot be discarded.
[action] Parley. Choose a [[Casino]] enemy at your location and test [willpower] or [intellect] (3). If you succeed, exhaust The Face to reduce any investigator's alarm level by 1.

88029.name: The Muscle
88029.unparsed_text:
Cannot be discarded.
[reaction] After you defeat a [[Casino]] enemy, exhaust The Muscle: Reduce your alarm level by 1 (2 instead if there are no other [[Casino]] enemies at your location or a connecting location).

88030.unparsed_text:
Cannot be discarded.

88031.unparsed_text:
Cannot be discarded.
[reaction]
When you check game icons while resolving an ability on a [[Game]] location, exhaust The Grifter: Choose one -
- Raise your alarm level by 1 to change the rank, suit, or color of a discarded game icon (to anything).
- Reduce your alarm level by 1.

88032.name: Isamara Ordoñez
88032.unparsed_text: [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (X), where X is the highest alarm level among the investigators. If you succeed, place 1 clue (from the token pool) on Isamara Ordoñez. Then, if there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on her, remember that you "convinced Isamara to participate in the heist."

[fast]: Move Cash Cart to a connecting location.

Forced - When Cash Cart is defeated: Remember that you "stayed out of sight." Remove Cash Cart from the game.

88043.name: Deck of Possibilities
88043.unparsed_text:
Permanent.
[action]: Draw the top card of the possibilities deck. Flip this card over and consult the list on its other side to resolve its effect. Remove the drawn card from the possibilities deck for the remainder of the campaign. (Limit once per game.)

88044.unparsed_text:
.

88045.name: The Wellspring of Fortune
88045.unparsed_text: Shift - During the next skill test performed this round, the performing investigator reveals an additional chaos token, chooses one to resolve, and ignores the other. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

88048.unparsed_text:
Hunter.

You begin the game with Ravenous (Controlled Hunger) in play.
During each upkeep phase, draw 1 additional card and devour a non-weakness player card in your hand.
[fast]: Devour a non-story card controlled by an investigator at your location. (Limit once per round.)

89002.name: Ravenous
89002.unparsed_text:
Subject 5U-21 deck only. Permanent.
Each time you devour a card, place it facedown beneath Ravenous. You get +1 to each of your skills for each card beneath Ravenous (max +5).
Forced - If there are 5 or more cards beneath Ravenous: Flip it over.

89003.name: Regurgitation
89003.unparsed_text:
Subject 5U-21 deck only.
Fast. 
If Ravenous (Uncontrolled Hunger) is face up, flip it over. Choose and return up to 3 cards you devoured (beneath Ravenous or set-aside) to their owners' hands. For each card returned in this way,  or 1 horror

- -1: ...1 card at random from your hand.
- -2: ...a non-story, non-weakness asset controlled by an investigator at your location.
- -3: ...a player card attached to your location, or attached to an encounter card at your location.
- -4: ...the top 2 cards of each investigator's deck.
- -5: ...-3 cards of your choice from your hand.

Otherwise, move Mi‑Go Scientist once toward Brain Case’s location, and if it is at Brain Case’s location, attach Brain Case to it (if it is under an investigator’s control, they lose control of it)."

and +1 sanity for each [[Tome]] asset you control.

Alert. Patrol (nearest location with at least 1 memory). Retaliate.

Wendy Adams deck only. Permanent.

Wendy Adams deck only. Advanced.

Easy / Standard

05262.name: Gavriella's Fate
05262.unparsed_text:
Check the "Missing Persons" section of the Campaign Log. If Gavriella disappeared into the mist and you are on Gavriella's trail:
Gavriella stumbles out of the mist, her eyes bloodshot and her voice strained. "Where am I?… Who are you?"
Take control of the set-aside Gavriella Mizrah story asset. For the remainder of this scenario, she does not take up an ally slot. Next to Gavriella Mizrah's profile, record Gavriella is alive.If Gavriella was claimed by specters:
Flip this card to its enemy side and spawn it at your location. If you are on Gavriella's trail, it spawns exhausted and unengaged. Otherwise, it spawns engaged with you.Otherwise:
You find Gavriella's weapon lying in the grass, decayed and broken. No other sign of her can be seen.

05263.name: Jerome's Fate
05263.unparsed_text:
Check the "Missing Persons" section of the Campaign Log. If Jerome disappeared into the mist and you are on Jerome's trail:
Jerome crawls out of the mist, and you help him to his feet. "Oh god… the mist…" he whispers. "It's all connected… It's all connected…"
Take control of the set-aside Jerome Davids story asset. For the remainder of this scenario, he does not take up an ally slot. Next to Jerome Davids's profile, record Jerome is alive.If Jerome was claimed by specters:
Flip this card to its enemy side and spawn it at your location. If you are on Jerome's trail, it spawns exhausted and unengaged. Otherwise, it spawns engaged with you.Otherwise:
You find a scrap of paper from Jerome's pocket notebook on the ground. It simply reads: "HELP"

05264.name: Penny's Fate
05264.unparsed_text:
Check the "Missing Persons" section of the Campaign Log. If Penny disappeared into the mist and you are on Penny's trail:
Penny nearly runs directly into you. Her whole body shakes with panic as you hold her safe. "A-are you alive?" she cries. "Is this nightmare finally over?"
Take control of the set-aside Penny White story asset. For the remainder of this scenario, she does not take up an ally slot. Next to Penny White's profile, record Penny is alive.If Penny was claimed by specters:
Flip this card to its enemy side and spawn it at your location. If you are on Penny's trail, it spawns exhausted and unengaged. Otherwise, it spawns engaged with you.Otherwise:
You find Penny's apron lying on the ground, covered in blood. There is no other sign of her.

05265.name: Valentino's Fate
05265.unparsed_text:
Check the "Missing Persons" section of the Campaign Log. If Valentino disappeared into the mist and you are on Valentino's trail:
Valentino limps out of the mist, leaning on a nearby tree. He chuckles morbidly as he spots you. "Cavalry's finally here, eh?"
Take control of the set-aside Valentino Rivas story asset. For the remainder of this scenario, he does not take up an ally slot. Next to Valentino Rivas's profile, record Valentino is alive.If Valentino was claimed by specters:
Flip this card to its enemy side and spawn it at your location. If you are on Valentino's trail, it spawns exhausted and unengaged. Otherwise, it spawns engaged with you.Otherwise:
Valentino's cane lies in the mud, cracked nearly in half. Its handle is stained with old blood.

Forced - When 1 or more doom would be put into play, if there are any copies of The Nameless Madness still set aside: Instead, spawn 1 set-aside copy of The Nameless Madness at the location nearest to an investigator without a copy of that enemy that is connected to a location with a copy of that enemy.

Each revealed Mist-Pylon can be attacked as if it were an enemy. Its fight value is equal to its shroud value and its health is equal to its clue value. While it has no health remaining, it is collapsed (it remains in play).
[reaction] When you discover 1 or more clues at a Mist-Pylon, spend those clues: Deal that much damage to that Mist-Pylon.
Objective - At the end of the round, if each Mist-Pylon is collapsed, advance this act.
