[action] Investigators at The Bourse spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remove 1 doom from any location or from an asset you control. Any player may trigger this ability.

09643.name: The Bourse
09643.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

09644.name: The Bourse
09644.unparsed_text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, . You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, gain 2 fewer resources if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

09645.name: Windsor Palace Hotel
09645.unparsed_text:
While you are at Windsor Palace Hotel...
- ...if there is a Key Locus here, increase the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1.
- ...if there is no Key Locus here, reduce the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1.

09646.name: Victoria College
09646.unparsed_text: [reaction] When you would draw exactly 1 card from your deck while you are at Victoria College: Instead, look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 to draw, and shuffle the other back into your deck. (Limit once per round.)

09647.name: Qaitbay Citadel
09647.unparsed_text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Qaitbay Citadel: You cannot discover clues or expose concealed mini-cards at Qaitbay Citadel for the remainder of the round.

09648.name: The Corniche
09648.unparsed_text: Forced - After The Corniche is successfully investigated: Increase the difficulty of each other test performed at The Corniche this round by 2.

09649.name: Zan'et el Settat
09649.unparsed_text: Forced - When you fight an enemy while at Zan'et el Settat: You must either spend 1 action or increase that enemy's fight by 2 for this attack.

09650.name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
09650.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

09651.name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
09651.unparsed_text: [action]: Test [willpower] (6). If you succeed, automatically evade The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson (regardless of its current location). (Group limit once per game.)

09652.name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa
09652.unparsed_text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, . You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, draw 1 fewer card if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

09653a.name: Key Locus
09653a.unparsed_text:
You may attack Key Locus as if it were an enemy with 4 fight.
[action] Spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to Key Locus.
Forced - If Key Locus is defeated: Add it to the victory display.

09654a.name: The Claret Knight
09654a.unparsed_text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at The Claret Knight's location, if he is ready: He shifts each of his attached keys.

09655a.name: The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson
09655a.unparsed_text:
Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). Retaliate.
Forced - When The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from it, exhaust it, and move it to Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa, unengaged.

09656.name: Scarlet Beast
09656.unparsed_text:
Alert. Hunter. Retaliate.
Scarlet Beast gets +2 fight and -2 evade while it is at a [[Locus Site]] location.

09657.name: Coterie Provocateur
09657.unparsed_text:
Aloof. Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus).
Spawn - Nearest location with a Key Locus.
While Coterie Provocateur is ready, investigators at its location cannot attack anything with a title other than Coterie Provocateur.

09658.name: Locus Pulse
09658.unparsed_text: Forced - If there is no Key Locus at attached location: Discard Locus Pulse.

09659a.name: The Light of Pharos
09659a.unparsed_text: Shift - Play a card from your hand, at -3 cost. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

09660.name: Shades of Suffering
09660.unparsed_text:
Easy / Standard
[skull]: -X. X is half the number of charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (X cannot be greater than 6).
[cultist]: -4. If you fail by 2 or more, place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper.
[tablet]: -1. If you are at a location with a [[Geist]] enemy, reveal an additional chaos token.
[elder_thing]: -4. You may place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper to treat this token's modifier as 0 instead.

09662.name: Restless Dead
09662.unparsed_text:
If there is only one investigator in the game, this agenda gets +1 doom threshold.
Forced - When you engage Tzu San Niang: Investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group. If they cannot,  instead.
(Hint: When this agenda advances, Tzu San Niang will harvest a nearby spirit if her location is unknown!)

09663.name: Fear The Reaper
09663.unparsed_text:
Each [[Geist]] enemy gain hunter and retaliate and cannot be flipped over.
Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda: Remove 1 [[Geist]] enemy from beneath Tzu San Niang and spawn it faceup at her location.

09664.name: The Lady with the Red Parasol
09664.unparsed_text: Objective - Find Tzu San Niang before the agenda advances. When you engage Tzu San Niang, investigators must spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance. If they cannot, return her to the shadows and resolve her concealed keyword.

09665.name: Ghost Light
09665.unparsed_text:
[[Geist]] enemies cannot leave [[Haunted]] locations.
Objective - Quell the restless spirits before they are consumed by Tzu San Niang! At the end of the round, if there are no non-weakness [[Geist]] enemies in play, advance.

09666.name: Harvester of Woe
09666.unparsed_text:
[reaction] When you are dealt damage and/or horror from Tzu San Niang's forced effect, investigators at your location may spend any number of clues: Cancel that much damage/horror.
Objective - If Tzu San Niang is defeated, advance.

09667.name: Kuala Lumpur Station
09667.unparsed_text:
[fast] During your turn, pay 2 resources: Move (to a connecting location). (Limit once per turn.)
[action] Discard an asset you control from play: Gain resources equal to half the discarded asset's printed cost, rounded down, and remember that you "traded for a kitten." (Group limit once per game.)

09668.name: Kuala Lumpur Station
09668.unparsed_text:
[action]: Resign. "There's nothing more we can do here." You hastily book passage out of the city.
[action] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: . Remember that you "found a cheap memento."

09669.name: Selangor Club
09669.unparsed_text:
Each investigator at Selangor Club does not collect resources during the upkeep phase.
[action] Spend 2 resources: Parley. You enjoy a pleasant meal and drinks.  and 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location. (Limit once per round.)

09670.name: Selangor Club Padang
09670.unparsed_text: [action]: Parley. Test [combat] (4) to join the games. If you fail, remember that you "embarrassed the consulate." If you succeed, . (Max one success per round.)

09671.name: Melati's Shop
09671.unparsed_text: [action] Investigators at Melati's Shop spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remember that you "peered beyond." Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card or the other side of a [[Geist]] enemy in play.

09672.name: Wayang Kulit Theater
09672.unparsed_text:
X is equal to half the charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (to a max of 8).
[action] Investigators at Wayang Kulit Theater spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: . Remember that you "shared a deep pain."

09673.name: Tin Mine
09673.unparsed_text:
[action]: Test [agility] (6). Investigators at Tin Mine may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to automatically succeed. If you succeed,  and remember that you "found hidden bones." (Group limit once per game.)
Forced - After you fail a skill test while at Tin Mine:

09674a.name: Uncanny Shadow
09674a.unparsed_text:
Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09674c.name: Uncanny Shadow
09674c.unparsed_text:
Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09675a.name: Buried Miner
09675a.unparsed_text:
Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09675c.name: Buried Miner
09675c.unparsed_text:
Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09676a.name: Slain Foreman
09676a.unparsed_text:
Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09676c.name: Slain Foreman
09676c.unparsed_text:
Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health.
[action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side.
Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

09678.name: Spirit Harvest
09678.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror.
- Tzu San Niang shifts The Shade Reaper and then places 2 charges on it.

09679a.name: Tzu San Niang
09679a.unparsed_text:
Concealed 2.
Forced - When Tzu San Niang would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from her, remove all doom from play, return her to the shadows, and resolve her concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each location with a non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy.

09680a.name: The Shade Reaper
09680a.unparsed_text: Shift - Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. You may move that enemy to a connecting location. You may force that enemy to attack another enemy at its location, dealing its horror as damage. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

09681.name: Without a Trace
09681.unparsed_text:
Easy / Standard
[skull]: -X. X is half the number of locations in play, rounded down.
[cultist]: -4. If you fail, the nearest [[Outsider]] enemy readies, moves once toward you, and attacks you if it is at your location.
[tablet]: -X. X is the number of set-aside hollows you own (max 5).
[elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, as a hollow.

09682.name: Otherworldly Horror
09682.unparsed_text:
As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group.
[reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location).

09683.name: Otherworldly Lambs
09683.unparsed_text:
As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group.
[reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location).

09684.name: Otherworldly Slaughter
09684.unparsed_text:
As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group.
[reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location).
[fast]  or 1 direct horror: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card (without exposing it). (Group limit once per round.)

09685.name: Traversing the Outside
09685.unparsed_text: Objective - Find the heart of the Outsiders' domain. When the Outsiders' Lair is revealed, advance.

09686.name: Red Ruin
09686.unparsed_text:
The Red-Gloved Man cannot be discarded or drawn.
[action] If Mimetic Nemesis is at your location, spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to it. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity from Mimetic Nemesis.
Objective - When The Red-Gloved man enters play, advance.

09687.name: Escaping the Otherworld
09687.unparsed_text:
Each [[Outsider]] enemy loses aloof.
Forced - If The Red-Gloved Man is defeated: Remove him from the game.
Objective - Time to get the hell out of here! If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

09688.name: Court of the Outsiders
09688.unparsed_text: [action]: Resign. Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, you resign, adding each [[Conspirator]] asset you control to the victory display. If you fail, you remain trapped here, and this test gets -1 difficulty until the end of your turn. If each surviving investigator has resigned, immediately advance to act 3b.

09689.name: Outsiders' Lair
09689.unparsed_text:
Each [[Outsider]] enemy at this location loses aloof and gets +1 fight and +1 evade.
[fast] If The Red-Gloved Man is the only set-aside hollow: Put him into play under the control of any investigator at Outsiders' Lair.

09690.name: Mimetic Nemesis
09690.unparsed_text:
Alert. Hunter. Massive. Retaliate.
Forced - When you would deal damage to this enemy: Instead, choose and discard that many set-aside hollows.
Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at this enemy's location must either choose a non-weakness card in their hand and set it aside, as a hollow, or this enemy attacks them.

09691.name: Protoplasmic Reassembler
09691.unparsed_text:
Massive.
Spawn - Location farthest from all investigators.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if this enemy is ready: Spawn the top card of the nearest investigator's deck facedown at its location as a Golem enemy. Golems have: "[[Monster. Outsider.]] Hunter. 1 fight, 1 health, 1 evade, 1 damage value. If Golem is defeated, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow."

09692.name: The Red-Gloved Man
09692.unparsed_text: [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade an [[Outsider]] enemy by 2 or more, exhaust The Red-Gloved Man: Deal 1 damage to that enemy and

09693.name: Aliki Zoni Uperetria
09693.unparsed_text: [reaction] After a concealed mini-card is exposed, exhaust Aliki Zoni Uperetria: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it.

09694.name: Congress of the Keys
09694.unparsed_text:
Easy / Standard
[skull]: -X. X is the current act number.
[cultist]: -5. You may flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side to treat this token's modifier as -2, instead.
[tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against a ready [[Outsider]] enemy, you automatically fail, instead.
[elder_thing]: -3. Cancel the effects and icons of each card committed to this test and set each of them aside, out of play, as hollows.

09695.name: Conflux of Consequence
09695.unparsed_text: Forced - When this agenda advances, if it is act 2, 3, or 4: Skip the "b" side of this agenda and proceed directly to agenda 2a.

09698.name: Secrets and Lies (v. I)
09698.unparsed_text:
The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged.
Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

09699.name: Secrets and Lies (v. II)
09699.unparsed_text:
Do not draw cards from the encounter deck during the mythos phase.
Objective - Prepare for your journey into the Outside, and proceed when you are ready. At the end of any round, if each investigator is at the same location, they may advance. The sooner, the better. (Hint - You will also be forced to advance automatically when the agenda advances.)

09700.name: Secrets and Lies (v. III)
09700.unparsed_text:
The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged.
Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

09701.name: To the Tower
09701.unparsed_text:
Locations and concealed mini-cards cannot be placed adjacent to [[Tower]] locations.
Objective - Find a way into the tower where the infiltrator lies in wait. If an investigator enters the Gravity-Defying Climb, advance.

09702.name: The Ascent
09702.unparsed_text: Objective - Ascend. If an investigator enters The Towering Vertex, advance.

09703.name: The Final Err
09703.unparsed_text:
[action] Flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side: Remove an exposed decoy from the game.
Objective - If Mimetic Nemesis is defeated, advance.

09704.name: Scarlet Halls
09704.unparsed_text: [fast] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Move (to a connecting location).

09705.name: Scarlet Halls
09705.unparsed_text: Forced - After you enter Scarlet Halls: For the remainder of your turn, as an additional cost for you to move from Scarlet Halls to a connecting location, you must either exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control or spend an additional action.

09706.name: Congress Chamber
09706.unparsed_text: [action] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for an asset, draw it, and shuffle the rest into your deck.

09707.name: Congress Chamber
09707.unparsed_text: While there is a ready [[Coterie]] enemy at Congress Chamber, increase the cost of each asset played by each investigator at Congress Chamber by 2.

09708.name: Coterie Library
09708.unparsed_text: [action]: Reduce the cost of the next asset you play this round by 2. You may exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset to treat this ability as a [fast] ability instead of an [action] ability for this activation.

09709.name: Coterie Library
09709.unparsed_text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Coterie Library: The nearest [[Coterie]] enemy with an attached key shifts each of their attached keys.

09710.name: The Key Reliquary
09710.unparsed_text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate The Key Reliquary: Instead of discovering clues, choose an unempowered key attached to an investigator at your location. Place a resource (from the token pool) on that key, as an empowerment; that key is empowered (if it is shifted, its controller may spend the empowerment instead of flipping it to its [[Unstable]] side).

09711.name: The Key Reliquary
09711.unparsed_text: The Key Reliquary gets +2 shroud for each [[Unstable]] key in play.

09712.name: The Knotted Tower
09712.unparsed_text: [reaction] After a location is placed adjacent to The Knotted Tower: Move to that location (from The Knotted Tower).

09713.name: Gravity-Defying Climb
09713.unparsed_text:
Forced - When a concealed mini-card around Gravity-Defying Climb is exposed: If it is...
- ...the next in the sequence listed on The Towering Vertex, it remains in play and exposed, and you may expose another concealed mini-card.
- ...any other mini-card, flip it and each other concealed mini-card facedown (without shuffling them).

09714.name: The Towering Vertex
09714.unparsed_text:
Forced - When a concealed mini-card around The Towering Vertex is exposed: If it is...
- ...the Mimetic Nemesis's mini-card, deal the Mimetic Nemesis 3 damage, then flip all concealed mini-cards facedown and shuffle them facedown.
- ...a decoy, it remains in play and exposed.

09715.name: Mimetic Nemesis
09715.unparsed_text:
Massive. Cannot make attacks of opportunity.
Mimetic Nemesis gets +3 [per_investigator] health.
Forced - When Mimetic Nemesis would take 1 or more damage from an attack or player card: Choose and reveal a concealed mini-card. If it is a decoy, cancel all damage just dealt (the decoy remains in play and faceup). Otherwise, the damage is dealt as normal, then flip all revealed mini-cards facedown and shuffle them.

09716a.name: Coterie Agent (A)
09716a.unparsed_text:
Concealed 2.
Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it.
[reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

09716b.name: Coterie Agent (B)
09716b.unparsed_text:
Concealed 2.
Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it.
[reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

09716c.name: Coterie Agent (C)
09716c.unparsed_text:
Concealed 2.
Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it.
[reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

09720.name: Coterie Envoy
09720.unparsed_text:
Aloof. Patrol (nearest location with a concealed mini-card and no Coterie Envoy)
While Coterie Envoy is ready, concealed mini-cards at its location cannot be exposed via player card effects.
[reaction] After you defeat Coterie Envoy: Look at the revealed side of any concealed mini-card in play.

09721.name: In Plain Sight
09721.unparsed_text: Forced - After you expose attached enemy: That enemy attacks you and gets +2 fight until the end of the round. Discard In Plain Sight.

09722.name: Knives in the Dark
09722.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you expose a decoy: . (Limit once per round.)
Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [agility] (3). If you succeed, discard Knives in the Dark

09724.name: Seeing Shadows
09724.unparsed_text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at a location with a concealed mini-card:

09725.name: Figures in the Dark
09725.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Each enemy in the shadows attacks you.
- Each investigator loses an action.

09726a.name: Coterie Enforcer (A)
09726a.unparsed_text:
Concealed 1.
Forced - After you expose an enemy in the shadows not named Coterie Enforcer, if Coterie Enforcer is in the shadows: It attacks you.

09726b.name: Coterie Enforcer (B)
09726b.unparsed_text:
Concealed 1.
Forced - After you expose an enemy in the shadows not named Coterie Enforcer, if Coterie Enforcer is in the shadows: It attacks you.

09727a.name: Coterie Assassin (A)
09727a.unparsed_text:
Concealed 1.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Coterie Assassin is in the shadows: It attacks each investigator at each location with 1 or more concealed mini-cards.

09727b.name: Coterie Assassin (B)
09727b.unparsed_text:
Concealed 1.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Coterie Assassin is in the shadows: It attacks each investigator at each location with 1 or more concealed mini-cards.

09729.name: Bound in Red
09729.unparsed_text:
Attached enemy gets +1 fight, +1 evade, +1 damage, and +1 horror.
[action]: Flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side. Then, discard Bound in Red. An investigator at any location may trigger this ability.

09731.name: Paracausal Entity
09731.unparsed_text:
Hunter.
Forced - When Paracausal Entity engages you: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

09732.name: Apocalyptic Presage
09732.unparsed_text:
Forced - When Apocalyptic Presage enters play: Each investigator chooses a non-weakness card they control in their hand or play area and sets it aside, out of play, as a hollow.
[reaction] When Apocalyptic Presage is defeated: Instead of adding it to the victory display, discard it and choose up to 3 set-aside hollows. Add them to their owners' hands.

09734.name: Otherworldly Mimic
09734.unparsed_text:
Aloof. Hunter.
Forced - If Otherworldly Mimic is ready, when an investigator at its location plays, commits, or triggers an ability on a copy of a set-aside hollow: It attacks that investigator.

09735.name: Memory Variant
09735.unparsed_text:
Forced - After an event is played: Instead of discarding it, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.
[action]: Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, discard Memory Variant. Any investigator may trigger this ability.

09737.name: Paradigm Effacer
09737.unparsed_text:
Aloof. Hunter.
Forced - After you end your turn at Paradigm Effacer's location: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow. Then, if you own 3 or more set-aside hollows, Paradigm Effacer attacks you.

09738.name: Matter Inversion
09738.unparsed_text:
Attached enemy loses aloof, gains retaliate, and gets +1 fight and +1 evade.
Forced - After attached enemy is successfully evaded: Discard Matter Inversion and draw 1 of your set-aside hollows.

09739.name: Emissary from Yuggoth
09739.unparsed_text:
Concealed 2. Hunter. Massive.
Forced - After you discover a clue at a location with 1 or more concealed mini-cards, if Emissary from Yuggoth is in the shadows: It attacks you.

09740.name: Tenebrous Eclipse
09740.unparsed_text:
No more than 1 concealed mini-card can be exposed by each investigator each round.
Forced - At the end of the round: Discard 1 copy of Tenebrous Eclipse from play. (Max once per round.)

09743.name: Warped Reality
09743.unparsed_text: Forced - After you end your turn at attached location: Choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

09745.name: Compulsion
09745.unparsed_text: Forced - When your turn begins: Reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag. If it is a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] token, the first action you perform during this turn must be the below ability, if able.

09746.name: Distorted Reasoning
09746.unparsed_text:
You cannot perform the same type of action twice in a row. (Types include activate, engage, evade, fight, investigate, move, play, resource, and draw.)
Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Distorted Reasoning.

09747a.name: Rambling Route
09747a.unparsed_text:
Increase the difficulty to fight or evade each concealed mini-card at Rambling Route by 2.
[action] Spend X resources: Choose a concealed mini-card adjacent to a location X connections away. Look at its revealed side (without exposing it). (Group limit once per game.)

09747b.name: Rambling Route
09747b.unparsed_text:

09749a.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you reveal Weald of Effigies: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.
[fast] If there are no clues on Weald of Effigies: Either swap the positions of 2 concealed mini-cards adjacent to locations, or swap the positions of 2 locations in the shadows. (Group limit once per game.)

09749b.unparsed_text:
Forced - After you reveal Weald of Effigies: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

09750.name: Cliffs of Insanity
09750.unparsed_text: Forced - After you reveal Cliffs of Insanity: Move each concealed mini-card adjacent to it so they are arranged as evenly as possible in empty spots adjacent to locations not named Cliffs of Insanity.

09751.name: Paradimensional Terror
09751.unparsed_text:
Peril.

- Flip each decoy over. Shuffle all concealed mini-cards in play, then place them facedown at random in the positions they were in.
- Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror.

09752.unparsed_text:
Retaliate.
Forced - After you flip a key from its [[Unstable]] side to its [[Stable]] side: The Red-Gloved Man attacks you. Then, the Red-Gloved Man shifts each of his attached keys.

09753.unparsed_text:
Aloof.

[reaction] After La Chica Roja is defeated: Distribute her resources among the investigators, as you wish.

09754.unparsed_text:
Hunter.

Aloof.
Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Each investigator looks at the top card of their deck. Set each non-weakness card looked at in this way aside, out of play, as a hollow. If there is already a copy of that card set aside as a hollow, Aliki Zoni Uperetria shifts each of her attached keys.

09762.name: Inspector Flint

In either case,  for each card shuffled in this way

Permanent.

- Immediately shift an [[Unstable]] key you control.

[action]: Search your deck for a [[Tome]] asset and draw it. Shuffle your deck. (Limit once per game.)

10712a.unparsed_text: [action]: You inspect the communal hall and check out the local delivery service ([codex] 16).

11068a.name: The Great Work
11068a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase only at deck creation.
You earn 1 additional experience after each scenario of this campaign. If you are defeated, you are usurped by the homunculus (replace each signature card in your deck with a random basic weakness, flip this card, and swap it with your investigator for the remainder of the campaign).

11672a.name: Obsidian Claw
11672a.unparsed_text:
Cannot leave play. Enters play (Speed) side faceup.
[fast] During your turn, exhaust this card and choose a location up to 2 connections away: Move to the chosen location.
[tdc_rune_a] · [tdc_rune_p] · [tdc_rune_m] · [tdc_rune_e] · [tdc_rune_b] · [tdc_rune_c]
[fast]: Flip this card. (Max once per round.)

11688a.name: The Doom of Arkham Pt II
11688a.unparsed_text:
Easy / Standard
[skull]: -X. X is Cthulhu's Rage.
[cultist]: -3. If you fail and your location is flooded, .
[tablet]: -3. If you fail, place 1 of your clues on your location.
[elder_thing]: -1. Reveal another token. If you fail, after this test resolves, draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck. (Max one draw per round.)

11691a.name: Banish Him!
11691a.unparsed_text:
[fast] During an attack at your location, spend 1 clue: That attack deals +1 damage. (Max once per attack.)
Objective - When the round ends, if there are 3 [[Cthulhu]] enemies in the victory display, advance.

11691b.name: The Final Seal
11691b.unparsed_text:
[action] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, and place an [[Artifact]] asset you control in the victory display: Place 1 resource (from the token pool) on your location, as a sigil.
Forced - When the enemy phase ends: Draw the top card of the Cthulhu deck.
Objective - Banish the awakened dreamer! If each [[Cthulhu]] enemy is in the victory display and there are 5 locations with sigils on them, immediately advance.

11753a.name: No Place Like Home
11753a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Uses (8 discoveries).
Forced - When you reveal a location or put a location into play: Remove 1 discovery from No Place Like Home.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are 1 [per_investigator] or fewer discoveries on No Place Like Home: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11754a.name: Walk in Faith
11754a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Uses (0 signs).
[reaction] After an [elder_sign] token is revealed at any location: Place 1 sign on Walk in Faith.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are more than 1 [per_investigator] signs on Walk in Faith: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11755a.name: Toe the Line
11755a.unparsed_text:
Permanent.
Forced - When you take 1 or more damage: Place 1 damage on Toe the Line as well.
Forced - When the game ends, if the amount of damage on this card equals or exceeds your maximum health: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11756a.name: Good Money
11756a.unparsed_text:
Permanent.
[reaction] When you gain 1 or more resources: Place 1 of those resources on Good Money.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are 5 or more resources on Good Money: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11757a.name: Prove Your Worth
11757a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Uses (4 chances).
Forced - After you fail a skill test by 2 or more: Remove 1 chance from Prove Your Worth.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are 1 or more chances on Prove Your Worth: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11758a.name: Do No Harm
11758a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Uses (5 obligations).
[reaction] After you heal damage/horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: Remove 1 obligation from Do No Harm.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are no obligations on Do No Harm: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11759a.name: Dreams of Destruction
11759a.unparsed_text:
Permanent.
Forced - When you take 1 or more horror: Place 1 horror on Dreams of Destruction as well.
Forced - When the game ends, if the amount of horror on this card equals or exceeds your maximum sanity: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

11760a.name: Plumb the Depths
11760a.unparsed_text:
Permanent. Uses (5 obsessions).
Forced - After you discover the last remaining clue at your location: Remove 1 obsession from Plumb the Depths.
Forced - When the game ends, if there are no obsessions on Plumb the Depths: In your Campaign Log, mark 1 progress under this Task.

50026a.name: Predator or Prey?
50026a.unparsed_text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

50032a.name: Return to The Devourer Below
50032a.unparsed_text: Perform the setup as indicated in the Night of the Zealot Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:- When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Devourer Below shown here.- When choosing 4 Arkham Woods locations to put into play at random, include the 4 new Arkham Woods locations included in this encounter set, for a total of 10 possibilities.- After setting the Umôrdhoth enemy aside, flip this card over and attach it to Umôrdhoth.

51026b.name: The Conductor
51026b.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Leftmost location.
Hunter. Massive.
Forced - When The Conductor is defeated: Attach it to the current agenda. After you advance the attached agenda, draw The Conductor.
Forced - When The Conductor's location leaves play: Instead of discarding The Conductor, move it one location to the right.

83022b.name: To the Dreamlands
83022b.unparsed_text:
Put each of the remaining set-aside locations into play, revealed location side faceup - The Great Abyss, Tunnels under Ngranek, Stairway to Sarkomand, and Mist-Filled Caverns. (Place clues on each of those locations equal to their clue value.)
The investigator resolving this text disengages from each engaged enemy and moves to The Great Abyss.
Flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

83023b.name: Fate of the Dreamers
83023b.unparsed_text:
You must decide (choose one):
- Remove 2 strength from the abyss.
- Add 2 strength to the abyss.
Regardless of your choice, flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

83024b.name: Prisoners of Conquest
83024b.unparsed_text:
You must decide (choose one):
- Test [agility] (4) to free the creatures. If you succeed, one of them hands you 3 black whistles before they fly off toward their master; take control of the set-aside Summoned Nightgaunt asset and remember that you "freed the nightgaunts."
- Test [combat] (4) to slay the creatures. If you succeed, remember that you "executed the nightgaunts."
Regardless of your choice and whether you succeed or fail the indicated skill test, flip this card back over.

83025b.name: Ruins of Sarkomand
83025b.unparsed_text:
You must decide (choose one):
- Test [intellect] (3) to speak to the almost-humanoid creatures that dwell in these ruins. If you succeed, you warn them of the battle below and they flee; remember that you "warned the denizens of Sarkomand."
- Test [combat] (3) to block the trapdoor. If you succeed, you topple the lion statues and use them to block the entrance to the stairway as you descend back into the depths; remember that you "cut off all escape."
Regardless of your choice and whether you succeed or fail the indicated skill test, flip this card back over.

83026b.name: Effigy of Nodens
83026b.unparsed_text:
You must decide (choose one):
- Test [willpower] (2) to entreat the entity depicted in this statue for aid. If you succeed, remember that you "pled for help."
- Test [combat] (2) to overthrow the statue. If you succeed, it topples over and shatters into pieces on the jagged cavern floor; remember that you "affronted the ruler of this realm."
Regardless of your choice and whether you succeed or fail the indicated skill test, flip this card back over.

83027a.name: Xzharah
83027a.unparsed_text:
Hunter. Retaliate
Xzharah gets +5 [per_investigator] health and cannot be defeated by damage.
[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] or [intellect] (X), where X is the strength of the abyss. If you succeed, flip this enemy over and resolve the text on its other side. If you fail, Xzharah attacks you.

83031a.name: Dr. Layla El Masri
83031a.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Expedition Camp.
[action] As a group, investigators at Dr. Layla El Masri's location discard cards from hand with a total of at least 4 [willpower] icons among them: Parley. Add Dr. Layla El Masri to the victory display.

83032a.name: Dr. Wentworth Moore
83032a.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Museum of Egyptian Antiquities.
Dr. Wentworth Moore cannot be damaged while there is a ready [[Monster]] enemy at his location.
Forced - After Dr. Wentworth Moore enters play: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Monster]] enemy, and spawn it at his location. Shuffle the encounter deck.

83033a.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Temple Courtyard.
[action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (7). You may take up to 3 horror to reduce the difficulty of this test by 2 for each horror taken in this way. If you succeed, add Nadia Nimr to the victory display. If you fail, Nadia Nimr attacks you.

83034a.name: Farid
83034a.unparsed_text:
Spawn - Cairo Bazaar.
[action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (7). You may spend up to 5 resources to reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each resource spent in this way. If you succeed, add Farid to the victory display. If you fail, Farid attacks you.

Retaliate.
